exercises.stem: I didn't go to school ___ I was ill.
exercises.analysis: I was ill 是句子，需要用 because 引导原因状语从句。because of 后面只能接名词短语。

exercises.stem: He couldn't come to the party ___ his illness.
exercises.analysis: his illness 是名词短语，需要用 because of。because/since/as 后面接句子。

exercises.stem: ___ everyone knows the answer, I won't explain it again.
exercises.analysis: 「每个人都知道答案」是双方都知道的事实，用 since 表示已知原因比较恰当。

exercises.stem: We can say: "Because it rained, so I stayed home."
exercises.analysis: because 和 so 都表示因果关系，不能同时使用。正确形式：Because it rained, I stayed home. 或 It rained, so I stayed home.

segments: She was absent ___1___ she had a fever.
He got the job ___2___ his excellent performance.
exercises.analysis: 第一句 she had a fever 是句子，用 because。第二句 his excellent performance 是名词短语，用 because of。

exercises.question: 用 because 或 because of 填空并说明理由：The game was cancelled ___ the bad weather.
exercises.referenceAnswer: because of。理由：the bad weather 是名词短语，不能用 because（because 后接句子），应该用 because of + 名词短语。
scoringPoints: 能解释 the bad weather 是名词短语
能区分 because 和 because of 的用法
